content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed the bead selection implementation across src/cli/run.rs and src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs. The implementation correctly follows the state machine design: transitions to Selecting, queries bv --robot-next, validates against br ready/show, and routes to Claimed (valid+ready), Blocked (mismatch/no-ready), or NeedsOperator (tool failure). All 643 tests pass including 13 new deterministic tests covering single-ready, conflicting-recommendation, no-ready, tool-failure, reconciliation-continues-selection, and replay-idempotency scenarios. No new clippy warnings introduced (count unchanged at 20 pre-existing). The selection-failure-is-non-fatal path in reconciliation is properly handled as a warning rather than blocking the bead close+sync outcome. The controller_requires_terminal_task_sync guard correctly prevents replay syncs from overwriting a controller that has already advanced to selecting the next bead. The LIFO mock ordering in reconciliation tests is verified correct against MockBrRunner::pop() behavior.

## Amendments

None.
